BUSINESS PROBLEM UNDERSTANDING¶

  • Understanding the client requirement
In [14]:
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
%matplotlib inline

import seaborn as sns

import warnings
warnings.simplefilter('ignore')

DATA ANALYSIS & VISUALIZATION¶

In [49]:
mode_sales = df.groupby('Ship Mode')['Sales'].sum().reset_index()

ax = sns.barplot(data=mode_sales, x='Ship Mode', y='Sales', hue = 'Ship Mode')

for container in ax.containers:
    ax.bar_label(container, fmt='%.1f', padding=15, color='orange', fontsize=15)

sns.set_style("dark")
plt.title('Sales in each ShipMode', fontsize=16, pad=20, color='Blue')
plt.xlabel('Ship Mode', color='Green')
plt.xticks(color = 'red')
plt.ylabel('Total Sales', color='blue')

plt.show()
In [50]:
mode_sales = df.groupby('Segment')['Sales'].sum().reset_index()

ax = sns.barplot( data =mode_sales , x = 'Segment', y = 'Sales' , hue='Segment' )

for container in ax.containers:
    ax.bar_label(container, fmt='%.1f', padding=15, color='orange', fontsize=15)

sns.set_style("dark")
plt.title("Sales in each Segment", color='green', pad=15, fontsize=15)
plt.xlabel('Segment', color='Green')
plt.xticks(color='red')
plt.ylabel('Total Sales', color='blue')

plt.show()
In [77]:
mode_sales = df.groupby('Category')['Sales'].sum().reset_index()

ax = sns.barplot(data = mode_sales, x = 'Category', y = 'Sales', hue='Category')

for container in ax.containers:
    ax.bar_label(container, color='blue', padding=10, fontsize=15)

plt.title('Sales in each Category wise Plot', pad=15, fontsize=15 , color='green')
plt.xlabel('Category', fontsize=10, color='red')
plt.xticks(color = 'green', fontsize=10)
plt.ylabel('Sales', color='Red')
Out[77]:
Text(0, 0.5, 'Sales')
In [52]:
mode_Sales = df.groupby('Sub-Category')['Sales'].sum().reset_index()

ax = sns.barplot(data = mode_Sales,x = 'Sub-Category',y = 'Sales', hue= 'Sub-Category', orient="h")

for container in ax.containers:
    ax.bar_label(container, color='green', fontsize=10)

plt.title(' Sales in Each Sub-Category', color='Red')
plt.xlabel('Sub-Category', color='green', fontsize=15)
plt.xticks(color='white')
plt.ylabel('Total_Sales', color='Green')
plt.show()
In [53]:
    
ax = sns.barplot(data=df, x='Category', y= 'Sales', hue='Region', palette = ['pink','blue','yellow'], estimator= np.sum)

for container in ax.containers:
    ax.bar_label(container, color='green', fontsize=12, padding=50)

plt.title('  Sales in each Category With Region Wise ', color= 'blue',fontsize=15, pad=15)
plt.xlabel('Category', color = 'Red')

plt.ylabel('Total_Sales', color = 'blue', fontsize= 10)
plt.show()
In [54]:
column = ['Sales','Quantity','Discount','Profit']

sns.heatmap( data= df[column].corr(), annot = True, cmap= 'Blues')
plt.title('Plot based on Sales Profit Quantity & Discount', color = 'green', fontsize = 15)
plt.xticks(color = 'green', fontsize = 10)
plt.yticks(color = 'blue', fontsize = 10)
Out[54]:
(array([0.5, 1.5, 2.5, 3.5]),
 [Text(0, 0.5, 'Sales'),
  Text(0, 1.5, 'Quantity'),
  Text(0, 2.5, 'Discount'),
  Text(0, 3.5, 'Profit')])

Profit Plot¶

In [68]:
sns.barplot( data = df,x = 'State', y = 'Profit', hue = 'State',estimator = np.sum , color='Blue' )
plt.title('Total Profit in each State', color = 'Green', fontsize=15)
plt.xlabel('State', color = 'Green')
plt.xticks(color = 'red', fontsize = 5)
plt.grid()
In [75]:
sns.barplot(data = df, x= 'Region', y = 'Profit',palette = ['pink','blue','yellow','green'] , hue = 'Region', estimator = np.sum)
plt.title('Total Profit in Each Region', color= 'Red', fontsize=15)
plt.xlabel('Region', color = 'blue', fontsize = 10)
plt.xticks(color = 'orange')
plt.ylabel('Total_Profit', color = 'green')
plt.grid()
In [57]:
sns.barplot(data=df, x = 'Sub-Category',y = "Profit", hue = 'Sub-Category',estimator = np.sum)
plt.title('Total profit in each Sub-Category',color = 'green', fontsize = 15)

plt.xlabel('Sub-Category', color = 'red')
plt.xticks(color = 'green', fontsize = 6)
plt.grid()
plt.ylabel('Total_Profit', color = "blue")
Out[57]:
Text(0, 0.5, 'Total_Profit')
In [78]:
sns.barplot(data = df, x = 'Category', y = 'Profit', hue = 'Category', estimator = np.sum)
plt.grid()
plt.title('Profit in each Category', color = 'red', fontsize=15)
plt.xlabel('Category' , color = 'blue')
plt.xticks(color = 'orange')
plt.ylabel('Total_Profit', color = 'blue')
Out[78]:
Text(0, 0.5, 'Total_Profit')

Quantity Plot¶

In [73]:
sns.barplot(data= df, x = 'Category', y = 'Quantity', hue = 'Category', color = 'Yellow', estimator = np.sum)
plt.grid()
plt.xlabel('Category', color = 'green')
plt.xticks(color  = 'red')
plt.ylabel('Total_Quantity', color = 'orange')
plt.title('Total Number of Quantity in Category', color = 'green', fontsize = 15)
Out[73]:
Text(0.5, 1.0, 'Total Number of Quantity in Category')
In [89]:
sns.barplot(data = df,x = 'Quantity',y = 'Sub-Category' , hue = 'Sub-Category', orient  = 'h', estimator = np.sum)
plt.grid()
plt.title('Total Quantity in each Sub_Category', color = 'green')
plt.xlabel('Total_Quantity', color = 'red')
plt.xticks(color = 'orange')
plt.ylabel('Sub_Category', color = 'green')
plt.yticks(color = 'blue')

sns.lineplot(data = df, x = 'Discount' , y = 'Quantity' , hue = 'Region', estimator = np.sum)
plt.grid()
plt.title('Discount & Quantity line plot in each Region', color = 'green', fontsize = 15)
plt.xlabel('Discount', color = 'blue')
plt.xticks(color = 'orange')
plt.ylabel('Total_Quantity', color = 'green')
plt.yticks(color = 'blue')
